_comment: Metadata registry for the i/* command surface. Loaded by i/help and any future tab-completion / cross-discovery tooling. Adding a new command: drop the script in i/, register it here, done. Schema per command: {description, usage?, examples?, category, modes?}. Fields beyond description are optional  i/help degrades gracefully when missing.

review.description: Post-change audit: KB constraints, boundary rules, doc drift, review verdicts.

learn.description: HME knowledge base: add, search, list, compact, export, dream, hypothesize.

trace.description: Causal/impact analysis and semantic search across signals, modules, beats.

holograph.description: Interstellar overview -- single ~12-line panel summarizing all 10 HME horizons (HCI phase, agent-loop, conjugate quadrant, KB graph density, fractal Gini trend, ground-truth verdicts, band proposal, causality marker, etc). Pure composition over existing data. The asymptote of the observability triad -- when you want every dimension at once. `mode=trajectory` shows horizon evolution over recent invocations.

timeline.description: Unified audit trail -- chronological view of HME's silent automations (auto-reload, KB draft writes, posttooluse hooks, fs_watcher events) joined into one timeline. Answers 'what has HME done in the last N minutes?' without reading 5+ files.

state.description: Unified state panel -- every state machine HME tracks, in one ~10-line view.

status.description: Status modes: budget, coherence, trajectory, resume, list, plus ~35 others.

evolve.description: Evolution recommendations: what to change next round, plus selftest.

hme-read.description: Pre-edit briefing: read a target with KB context, callers, structure.

hme-admin.description: Admin: selftest, reload, restart, index/clear_index, warm, introspect, validate, fix_antipattern, health.

hme.description: Convenience wrapper that dispatches to other i/* tools by subcommand.

freeze.description: Show arc-freeze marker; optionally check a query against the forbidden-pattern list.

pattern.description: Pattern catalogue: list, matched, or fetch by id.

why.description: Explain something the system did or is in. Three tiers: deterministic modes (block/state/verifier/hci-drop/hook), Tier-2 retrieval catch-all on multi-word questions (grep + KB + activity), Tier-3 subagent synthesis with --deep.
examples: i/why "where is the spam verifier defined"
i/why "what caused the HCI drop yesterday" --deep

todo.description: Hierarchical todo store + SPEC/TODO bridge + KB devlog archive on set completion.
examples: i/todo clear text="set name for archive"

substrate.description: Substrate browser: brief, detail, actions, drift, consensus, efficacy, patterns, diff, invariants.

extract-spec.description: Extract a structured spec for a target module/feature for evolution planning.

prove.description: Cross-file architectural invariant prover. Complements per-file ESLint rules with global/dataflow questions.

help.description: List all i/ tools grouped by category, with descriptions and usage.

sensitivity.description: Metaprofile attribution aggregator  per-profile score distribution, per-(profile, sectionType) breakdown, and ranking by mean score.

chain.description: Run an ordered Bash-skill chain from chains/<name>.yaml. Independent of BUDDY_SYSTEM.

audit-tools.description: UX stress test for i/* CLI surface. Each probe runs inside a transient systemd-run --scope cgroup (MemoryMax=512M, TasksMax=64) so disown'd/double-forked descendants of HME posttooluse hooks die atomically with the scope. Crashed the host twice before this isolation landed; treat with caution on first re-enable.

audit-tiered.description: Run tiered HME audits over changed files and coherence surfaces.

blast-radius.description: Estimate implementation blast radius for changed files or targets.

decision-audit.description: Audit recent decisions for evidence, reversibility, and coherence debt.

fork-watchdog.description: Watch forked/background agent tasks for stale or missing completion signals.

learnings.description: Surface extracted HME learning candidates and summaries.

parallel-detect.description: Run detector groups in parallel for faster coherence checks.

project-detect.description: Detect project shape and HME-relevant environment signals.

team.description: Team IPC coordination dashboard -- multi-agent context health, status, and last-active tracking.

_dispatch.sh.description: Private dispatch helper shared by i/dispatch aliases.
